task_description: Create public/pages/mdsa.html - a new product page for Manulife Dynamic Smart Assurance (MDSA) following the mccp.html pattern with question-based content, keyword color highlighting, premium tables, and an error-free JSON-lookup premium calculator.

verification.summary: File created (145KB). JavaScript syntax validation passes for both script blocks. PREMIUM_DATA contains 142 keys (71 pria + 71 wanita, ages 0-70). MIUHC_DATA contains 86 ages per gender with 15 plan options each. Calculator logic verified: Limited Pay correctly divides UP by 10, Regular Pay correctly looks up rates from data arrays, MiSHC rider lookup works, MiSCCP lookup works. All keyword highlights present (36 kw, 8 kw-cta, 10 kw-gold, 8 kw-blue). All section headings use question-based language. 12 FAQ items included. WhatsApp CTA link correct.
